docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) VERONICA ROSALES, APOYO FINANCERO FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: PER KARLSON UNG (ADMINISTRATION), WHO CHECKED THE EMPLOYEE DIRECTORY, THE DEFENDANT IS NOT LISTED AS AN EMPLOYEE AT THIS ADDRESS. THE SERVICE IS UNSUCCESSFUL AS THE DEFENDANT COULD NOT BE FOUND AT THIS ADDRESS GIVEN THE PROVIDED INFORMATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COLON PEREZ, NARCISO MARCELO
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
DECLARATION EXPLAINING CASE AND PRAYER AMOUNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2025 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-23-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COURT UNAVAILABLE DURING CIVIC CENTER POWER OUTAGE. NO APPEARANCES. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COLON PEREZ, NARCISO MARCELO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-20-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES, AGENT. DEFENDANT NARCISCO MARCELO COLON PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SANDRA HERNANDEZ, EXPERT CUSTOMER SERVICE REP. DEFENDANT NARCISO MARCELO COLON PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
